units.quote:
Go to Settings > get a free key

We will use gemini service linked to your google account
Read & Accept Google terms  > Copy API key

units.content:
# Installation
Recommend to use Chrome or Safari Browser
## Android
- Settings > Install app
## IOS
- Share > .. more > Add to Home Screen
## Desktop / Mac
- Nothing to install. Use browser

The Job Stopped Being the Job - Unknow with Nate Smalley

https://natesmalley.substack.com/p/the-job-stopped-being-the-job

Why Your Child Isn't a "Visual Learner" — And What Actually Helps

https://breakingthereadingcode.substack.com/p/why-your-child-isnt-a-visual-learner

How Should We Plan Reading Comprehension Lessons? | Shanahan on Literacy
https://www.shanahanonliteracy.com/blog/how-should-we-plan-reading-comprehension-lessons

units.quote: Share for IOS - it doesn't support share yet :( long story
Give short context in your own style.  eg what / why ?
Tap again to stop - 1burrow auto-categorizes. You change/ add new if you want. With more examples - the app gets familiar with your intent
To hide content from Gemini AI - hit on lock icon. Your quoted context (what/why) is always sent
